results.title: CIMB sees Axiata core profit rising 46pct in FY26 on merger synergies, asset monetisation
results.description: KUALA LUMPUR: CIMB Securities Sdn Bhd has forecasted Axiata Group Bhd’s core net profit (CNP) to rise by 46 per cent year-on-year (YoY) in financial year 2026 (FY26), followed by growth of between 18 per cent and 21 per cent in FY27-FY28.

results.title: Ambika Cotton, Ather Ind, Pearl Global: Bonanza bullish on these 3 stocks
results.description: Kunal Kamble, technical research analyst at Bonanza decodes technical charts of Ambika Cotton Mills, Ather Industries and Pearl Global Industries to explain why he is bullish on these 3 stocks.

results.title: The Forces Behind GOOGL’s Worst Session in a Year
results.description: Shares of Alphabet, the parent company of Google, suffered their worst trading session in a year, sending shockwaves through the technology sector and raising questions about the future of one of the world’s most dominant digital businesses. results.title: JD.com targets 700,000 workers for retraining as robots reshape logistics
results.description: Founder and chairman of Chinese e-commerce platform JD.com Qiangdong Liu said at the 2026 APEC Business Leaders China Forum that logistics and delivery work will gradually be handled by robots, with many courier jobs likely to be replaced by automation. He added that JD.com has launched an internal program called the "Nirvana Plan" to help about 700,000 logistics and blue-collar employees retrain and transition as AI reshapes the industry.
